title: map_artifact
description: Cross-reference of the brief's in-scope automation opportunities against the target Kitsoki story/script/hook inventory.

opportunities.description: One row per recurring automation opportunity.

theme.description: Plain-English decision the user/agent repeatedly faced.

intents.description: Distinct mined intents exhibiting this theme.

artifact_kind.description: What kind of Kitsoki artifact should own this opportunity.

status.description: Whether the opportunity is already covered, actionable now, blocked by a platform limit, or out of scope.

target_path.description: Exact room/script/skill/hook path to edit or create.

home_room.description: Room file path that owns (or would own) this decision, when applicable.

decider.description: Proposed decider kind: default-rule / LLM / human.

validator.description: The deterministic or recorded validator for this improvement.

kitsoki_usage_policy.description: How this makes Kitsoki the natural route, or the honest limit when it cannot.

themes.description: Backward-compatible alias for older flows; new producers should emit opportunities.

map_path.description: Path to the emitted opportunity-map markdown file, when one was written.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable map delivered to the transport.
